content.en:
Xingluan Dao Ancestor's body was motionless, and his life breath completely dissipated.

Xingluan Dao Ancestor, fallen!

Outside the island, many Dao Ancestors were terrified.

It was very hateful for Xingluan Dao Ancestor to sneak attack so many Dao Ancestors before, but so many Dao Ancestors plus a bunch of forbidden bloodline creatures could not offset the great terror, and even Xingluan Dao Ancestor himself was killed.

Xingluan Dao Ancestor is not a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but an Eightfold Heavenly Supreme Dao Ancestor, and it is a relatively powerful Supreme Dao Ancestor!

Such a powerful supreme Dao Ancestor, even an ordinary invincible Dao Ancestor would not dare to say that he would be killed in one blow, at least it would take two moves to kill him.

But in the face of the great terror, he was killed in seconds with a direct move, and he had no power to resist, I am afraid that no matter how strong the strength of Xingluan Dao Ancestor is, I am afraid that it will be the same fate.

Whoa!!!

A powerful Dao Ancestor and an invincible Dao Ancestor descended one by one, and the outside of the isolated island became lively.

And Ye Tian also came here, it was a Dao Ancestor of the Human Race who informed him that he had come here, because the situation here was too weird.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor!"

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor!"

Some Dao Ancestors greeted Ye Tian.

Among them, there are many Dao Ancestors who are more familiar with Ye Tian, such as the Fire King, the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor, the Xuanfeng Dao Ancestor, and so on.

The Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor opened his mouth and said, "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, the forbidden treasure that appeared this time is not simple!"

"Does the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor know the situation?"

Ye Tian asked.

Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor said: "The great terrifying power caused by the Forbidden Treasure that appeared this time is too terrifying, whoever dares to draw it out will fall and die, and even the strongest Dao Ancestor can't escape." Under normal circumstances, the Great Terror will only attack creatures that touch the Forbidden Arcana, and will not use its hands on the people around it. But this time is different, all Dao Ancestors who enter the scope of the isolated island, even if they stand still, as long as someone causes great terror, they will not be able to escape. Now, no one dares to enter the isolated island, otherwise someone deliberately touches the forbidden arcana, and everyone will die! According to my understanding of the great terror, the main reason is that the forbidden arcana, which corresponds to the arcana, is not ordinary, and the forbidden creatures that protect the arcana, are also extremely powerful, and can project a considerable part of the power through countless dark forbidden territories, and can attack independently. "

"A forbidden creature that can project a considerable amount of power!"

Ye Tian also sensed how difficult things were.

Of course, if you don't take an interest in this forbidden treasure, there will be no danger, because the power of great terror will not be able to spread beyond the island.

But such a forbidden treasure, everyone wants it!

With the passage of time, an invincible Dao Ancestor and a supreme Dao Ancestor gathered here, and everyone did not dare to cause a great terror casually.

After all, there is only one life, and once they fall, no one can resurrect them.

"Come on, I don't believe that a big terror can kill our invincible Dao Ancestor!"

An invincible Dao Ancestor spoke.

Everyone looked over, but they saw that it was the new invincible Dao Ancestor of King Kong City, the Golden Saint Dao Ancestor!

Jin Shengdao Ancestor had the title of invincible in the flesh when he was the strongest Dao Ancestor, although he was not as good as Yan Ancestor and Xuanhu Dao Ancestor, but his strength was also quite strong, and now he was promoted to Invincible Dao Ancestor, and his combat power was medium in the invincible Dao Ancestor level, but his defense and life-saving ability were top.

As a result, he is confident in his ability to save his life.

The others didn't dare to go in, but if he went in and withstood the great terror, he could easily take the forbidden treasure.

"The Golden Saint Dao Ancestor is brave enough, don't worry, if you really resist the Great Terror, I will not snatch your Forbidden Treasure!" said an invincible Dao Ancestor.

Immediately, an invincible Dao Ancestor also said that he would not snatch the forbidden treasure, but there were still a considerable number of Invincible Dao Ancestors who did not express their position.

Jin Shengdao Ancestor didn't care too much, even if there was an invincible Dao Ancestor who wanted to snatch him, it was not so easy to kill him.

He was confident that he would be able to escape.

Wow!

Jin Shengdao Ancestor stepped into the isolated island and came to the black wood, looking at the Dapeng phantom, his face was a little solemn.

"Go!"

After all, the invincible Dao Ancestors can ignore the great horror of forbidden and strange things, but it is also difficult to resist the great horror of the forbidden treasure, so they often capture some forbidden bloodline creatures as bait, and there are naturally not a few forbidden bloodline creatures captured on him.

Hundreds of forbidden bloodline creatures were thrown by him to unleash the terrifying power of this black log.

Rumble!!!!

The power of terror was triggered.

Puff puff puff!!

A forbidden bloodline creature erupted, falling and dying in an instant, and then one of the claws of the Illusory Dapeng extended towards the Golden Saint Dao Ancestor, the speed was too fast, and a suppressive force acted on the Golden Saint Dao Ancestor, making it difficult for him to move.

Poof!

Jin Shengdao Ancestor was attacked by a terrifying force, constantly destroying his physical body, and even his soul was injured.

"Not good!"

Jin Shengdao Ancestor was shocked, knowing very well that if he didn't run away, he would not be able to survive at all.

Immediately, he used a life-saving object to forcibly break free and came to the island, but the attack of the Great Terror did not continue to attack him.

Outside the island.

Jin Shengdao Ancestor's invincible body is constantly cracking and healing, and he himself is constantly coughing up blood, the world in his body is almost collapsing, his soul is also seriously damaged, and the injury can be described as quite serious, and his combat power is now less than two percent.

Seeing this scene, many Invincible Dao Ancestors were shocked.

How powerful is the Golden Saint Dao Ancestor's life-preserving ability and defensive ability, he is in such a miserable situation, wouldn't those ordinary invincible Dao Ancestors be killed with one move?

Moreover, if the Golden Saint Dao Ancestor did not escape, he would probably also die.

In this way, even the top invincible Dao Ancestors could not resist such a great terror, and only the half-step domain ancestors could resist such a great terror.

But this time, the Half-Step Domain Ancestors did not come, because a large Forbidden Void Realm could not attract the Half-Step Domain Ancestors.

There are too many opportunities in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and the half-step domain ancestors don't know how many opportunities they have obtained, and they are all seizing the time to cultivate and improve their strength, unless it is a real big opportunity, the half-step domain ancestors are not very willing to come out.

Moreover, the Dao Ancestors present were also reluctant to inform the Half-Step Domain Ancestors, otherwise where would they still have their share!

"Otherwise, if you collect enough forbidden bloodline creatures and then trigger the Great Terror together, I don't believe that the power of the Great Terror is endless. Once the power of the Great Terror is exhausted, how about everyone do this forbidden treasure fairly?"

Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor proposed.

"Yes, that's a good idea!"

"I agree!"

"Agreed!"

Many invincible Dao Ancestors agreed, and few of the strongest Dao Ancestors responded, because they didn't dare, their strength was too poor to take risks.
